{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [], "credits_detailed": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45722", "cvss": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": ["CWE-89"], "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-89", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')"}], "description": "### Impact

A missing sanitization in the Tables app allowed a user with access to the tables app to perform a limited SQL injection in the ORDER BY statement of a query. Compared to normal SQL injections, the ORDER BY is limited to extracting a single bit of information per request or to make the database wait for a given time.

### Patches

It is recommended that the Tables app is upgraded to 0.9.7 or 1.0.2

### Workarounds

* Disable app Tables

### References


* [HackerOne](https://hackerone.com/reports/3446689)
* [PullRequest](https://github.com/nextcloud/tables/pull/2186)

### For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory:

* Create a post in [nextcloud/security-advisories](https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/discussions)
* Customers: Open a support ticket at [portal.nextcloud.com](https://portal.nextcloud.com)", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-5h2w-c7px-hp4j", "html_url": "https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/security/advisories/GHSA-5h2w-c7px-hp4j", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-5h2w-c7px-hp4j"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45722"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-05-13T12:20:45Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/84044328?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/DorraJaouad", "id": 84044328, "login": "DorraJaouad", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg0MDQ0MzI4", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "high", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Tables app allows limited SQLi in ORDER BY with malicious sort order argument for Table Views", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T12:20:45Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nextcloud/security-advisories/security-advisories/GHSA-5h2w-c7px-hp4j", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "nextcloud", "name": "Tables"}, "patched_versions": "0.9.7, 1.0.2", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.9.0, >= 1.0.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Tables app allows limited SQLi in ORDER BY with malicious sort order argument for Table Views
